name: Frosted Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add molasses, egg, and sour milk; mix well until combined.
3. Gradually add flour mixture to the butter mixture. Stir in walnuts, raisins, and dates.
4. Chill dough for 30 minutes.
5. Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Cut with a 2 1/2-inch cutter. Place cookies on greased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until edges are set and bottoms are lightly browned.
8. Cool completely on wire racks.
9. For frosting, beat all ingredients in a small bowl until smooth. Frost cooled cookies.
